function:src/openhuman/agent/debug/mod.rs:integration
        .tools
        .iter()
        .map(|action| -> Box<dyn Tool> {
            Box::new(ComposioActionTool::new(
                arc_config.clone(),
                action.name.clone(),
                action.description.clone(),
                action.parameters.clone(),
            ))
        }).collect

function:src/openhuman/agent/debug/mod.rs:rendered_tools
        .iter()
        .map(|t| PromptTool {
            name: t.name(),
            description: t.description(),
            parameters_schema: Some(t.parameters_schema().to_string()),
        }).collect

function:src/openhuman/agent/debug/mod.rs:rendered_tools
            .iter()
            .map(|t| ToolSpec {
                name: t.name().to_string(),
                description: t.description().to_string(),
                parameters: t.parameters_schema().clone(),
            }).collect

function:src/openhuman/agent/dispatcher.rs:calls
            .into_iter()

            .collect::<Vec<_>>

function:src/openhuman/agent/dispatcher.rs:[
            "## Tool Use Protocol",
            "",
